heading: INT. CAMPUS BAR - NIGHT
description: MARK and ERICA sit at a small table in a crowded campus bar while students chat around them. Mark speaks intensely while Erica becomes increasingly uncomfortable.
visual_summary: A crowded bar with warm practical lights and a tense two-person conversation at center frame.

dialogue_lines.text: I didn't know they take SATs in China.

heading: INT. HOSPITAL CORRIDOR - NIGHT
description: A single nurse walks through a dim, nearly empty corridor. Fluorescent lights flicker overhead.
visual_summary: Long corridor perspective with one lone subject and sparse activity.

heading: EXT. CITY STREET - DAY
description: JAMIE confronts RYAN on a noisy downtown sidewalk while traffic and pedestrians pass behind them.
visual_summary: Dynamic street confrontation with moving background life.

heading: INT. LIVING ROOM - EVENING
description: SOFIA and LEO sit close together on a couch, speaking softly in a warm apartment lit by table lamps.
visual_summary: Intimate two-shot with warm practical lighting and shallow depth feel.

dialogue_lines.text: I don't want tonight to end.

heading: INT. CLASSROOM - DAY
description: MAYA stands at the front presenting while a full class watches from tiered desks.
visual_summary: Presenter foregrounded, audience depth visible behind.

dialogue_lines.text: This is how we can build it.
